grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive right to use System and operate one Hotel as Brand Hotel at approved Site
grant_and_term.term: 20 years for new-build from Opening Date; conversion term at franchisor's discretion
grant_and_term.renewal: NONE — no right to renew or extend
grant_and_term.hotel_technology_agreement: Initial 3-year term, auto 1-year renewals, coterminous with FA

fee_obligations.royalty: 5.5% of GRR, due 15th of following month
fee_obligations.system_services_fee: 4.5% of GRR, due 15th of following month

site_selection_and_construction.site_approval: Franchisee selects, franchisor approves within 60 days (deemed disapproved if no response)
site_selection_and_construction.plans_and_designs: Must be approved before construction/renovation begins
site_selection_and_construction.construction_commencement: Must begin by date in Exhibit A
site_selection_and_construction.construction_completion: Must complete by date in Exhibit A
site_selection_and_construction.pre_opening_inspection: Final inspection required before opening authorization

training_obligations.new_owner_orientation: Mandatory for 1 principal within 6 months (new build) / 3 months (conversion)
training_obligations.gm_certification: Mandatory before opening (new build) or within 60 days (conversion/transfer/new hire)
training_obligations.service_culture: Mandatory for all associates within 90 days of hire

operational_obligations.management: Either franchisee or approved Management Company must manage
operational_obligations.general_manager: Full-time, qualified GM required; must complete GM Certification
operational_obligations.standards_compliance: Must comply with Standards (124 pages), which may be unilaterally changed
operational_obligations.reservation_service: Must use designated Reservation Service exclusively; honor all confirmed reservations with priority
operational_obligations.loyalty_programs: Must participate in all required programs
operational_obligations.pricing: Franchisee sets own rates BUT franchisor may prohibit billing practices, require channel consistency, impose other pricing requirements
operational_obligations.no_dual_branding: May not affiliate Hotel with another franchise system, reservation service, brand, or trademark
operational_obligations.no_internet_marketing: May not use internet or social media to advertise/market without franchisor consent

curable_defaults.examples: Most defaults including operational non-compliance, reporting failures

termination_triggers.by_franchisee: Only if Hotel damaged beyond coverage limits or per state law

transfer_restrictions.exceptions: Certain non-control-change transfers require notice but not consent (Section 14.7)
conditions: Transferee updates hotel to current Standards
General release by franchisee and owners
Transferee submits new application + pays then-current initial franchise fee as transfer fee
Transferee enters then-current FA (may have materially different terms)
transfer_restrictions.death_disability: Must transfer within required timeframe; may terminate if not completed

cross_default.description: Default under any agreement with franchisor or any affiliate constitutes a default that could affect territory protection and trigger termination

guaranty.scope: Personal guaranty required if franchisee is an entity. Owners must guarantee. If Hotel owned by different entity, Hotel owner must sign guaranty.
guaranty.spousal_liability: Spouse must sign guaranty making them liable for all financial obligations (special risk #3)

liquidated_damages.less_than_5_remaining: Remaining days x average daily royalty
liquidated_damages.full_rates_used: Even if temporary reduction was granted
liquidated_damages.casualty_condemnation: Same formula applies + portion of insurance proceeds

dispute_resolution.arbitration: Mandatory for most disputes (AAA, JAMS, or NAF)
dispute_resolution.exceptions: Indemnification claims, injunctive/equitable relief, enforcement of arbitral awards
dispute_resolution.fallback: If NC law makes provision unenforceable and Hotel outside NC, law of Hotel's state applies
dispute_resolution.arbitrator_powers: Final and binding; may not amend FA; may award damages, specific performance, legal fees; may NOT award punitive/consequential/exemplary damages

waivers.punitive_damages: Waived to fullest extent permitted by law — limited to actual damages
waivers.class_actions: Waived — neither party may litigate/arbitrate as representative of class

indemnification.scope: Broad — franchisee must indemnify franchisor for all liabilities arising from: data loss/compromise, failure to comply with data protection/privacy, any franchisee actions, defaults, claims against franchisee or affiliates, any damages related to Hotel/Site/FA

distinctive_clauses.business_judgment_deference: Section 18.3 — where franchisor exercises business judgment, no mediator/judge/trier of fact shall substitute their judgment for franchisor's. Very strong deference clause.
distinctive_clauses.no_third_party_beneficiary: Section 20.5 — no third parties have rights under the FA
distinctive_clauses.right_of_first_offer: Exhibit F (optional, only for strategic markets) — franchisor's right of first offer, not refusal
distinctive_clauses.tenants_in_common: Section 5.22 — provisions for TIC ownership structures
distinctive_clauses.corrupt_practices: Section 20.8 — representations re Anti-Corruption Laws, FCPA, UK Bribery Act
distinctive_clauses.sanctioned_persons: Section 20.9 — representations re OFAC compliance, anti-terrorism
distinctive_clauses.suspension_interim_remedies: Section 15.3 — franchisor may suspend rather than terminate, imposing interim remedies
